passives.name: Support Quest
passives.effects: Earn {{g|400}} through ''Shared Riches'' and this item's {{stil|gold generation}} stat to automatically upgrade to {{ii|Runic Compass}}, gaining the ''Ward'' active with 3 wards in stock.

passives.name: Shared Riches
passives.effects:
Grants a '''Shared Riches''' charge every 20 seconds, up to 3 charges. When an allied champion is within {{tip|er|icononly=true}} 1050 units of you, consume a charge in the following ways:
• Kill a minion by any means, granting you {{g|15}} and the nearest allied champion kill {{g|gold}}. Damaging a minion {{as|'''below''' {{rd|50%|30%}} of its '''maximum''' health}} with a [[basic attack]] will {{tip|execute}} it, if any charges are available.
• Damage an enemy champion or structure with a basic attack or ability, granting you {{g|{{rd|22|20}}}}. A charge may be consumed this way only once per attack or ability.
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

effects_structured.raw: Earn 400 gold from Shared Riches and item gold generation to upgrade into Runic Compass (gain Ward active with 3 wards).
Gain a Shared Riches charge every 20s, up to 3 charges.
Shared Riches effects only consume charges when an allied champion is within 1050 units.
With an ally nearby, killing a minion grants you 15 gold and grants the nearest allied champion the kill gold.
If you basic attack a minion below 50% (melee) or 30% (ranged) max health, execute it when a charge is available.
Damaging an enemy champion or structure with a basic attack or ability grants 22 gold (20 ranged).
Excessive minion kills reduce gold earned (diminishing returns).

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: World Atlas is modeled as the support-quest starter that supplies Shared Riches charge economy and quest progression into Runic Compass.
Exact gold for allied champion kill credit is not specified; the effect notes kill credit without a numeric value.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior encodes page-verified pre/post-5-minute threshold formulas and reduction ranges, while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.
Sell-state policy resolved for support-quest staging: represent page-verified No Sell behavior with shop.prices.sell = 0 for quest-stage items.
Tier-1 dataset discrepancy is intentionally tracked: Data Dragon and CommunityDragon still list sell=160 for this item while page-level gameplay behavior shows No Sell.
